prompt_text: Userlist vs Customer.io pricing and features
response:
# Userlist vs Customer.io: Comparison

## Pricing

| Feature | Userlist | Customer.io |
|---------|----------|-------------|
| **Free Tier** | Yes (up to 1,000 contacts) | Yes (up to 10,000 contacts) |
| **Starting Price** | ~$99/month | ~$15/month |
| **Pricing Model** | Per contact/subscriber | Per contact (more gradual scaling) |
| **Contact Limit** | Scales with plan | Scales with plan |

## Core Features

### **Userlist**
- ✅ Product-led onboarding tools
- ✅ In-app messaging
- ✅ Segmentation & behavioral targeting
- ✅ Email campaigns
- ✅ User dashboards
- ✅ Zapier integration
- ⚠️ Limited SMS/push options

### **Customer.io**
- ✅ Comprehensive email & SMS marketing
- ✅ Advanced automation workflows
- ✅ Push notifications
- ✅ In-app messaging
- ✅ Detailed analytics & reporting
- ✅ Extensive app integrations
- ✅ Predictive analytics
- ✅ More customization options

## Key Differences

| Aspect | Userlist | Customer.io |
|--------|----------|------------|
| **Best For** | Product-led growth (PLG) companies | Overall customer engagement |
| **Learning Curve** | Simple, intuitive | Steeper, more powerful |
| **Automation** | Good | Excellent |
| **Customer Support** | Standard | Strong |
| **Scalability** | Good for startups | Enterprise-ready |

## Quick Decision Guide

**Choose Userlist if you:**
- Focus on product-led growth
- Need simple onboarding automation
- Have < 10K users
- Want affordability with core features

**Choose Customer.io if you:**
- Need advanced marketing automation
- Require SMS + email + push integration
- Want sophisticated segmentation
- Plan to scale to enterprise

Would you like details on specific features or integration capabilities?
